Input.name: customMods
Input.string: ^4Minion taunt Nearby enemies deal 10% less damage ^4Arcane Surge for minions (Bitterbind Point) Minions have 20% increased cast speed ^4Perfect Forest Warrior Compensation (not using it in high budget) Minions have 20% reduced cast speed
